fields.name: CR2R

fields.name: CB2G
fields.description: Cb-To-Green Coefficient, With Bits 9:8 As Positive Integer And 7:0 As Decimals.

fields.name: APOS
fields.description: Location Of The Alpha Component Inside The Pixel Memory Word (In Bits).

fields.name: ALEN
fields.description: Width Of The Alpha Component (In Bits).

fields.name: RPOS
fields.description: Location Of The Red Component Inside The Pixel Memory Word (In Bits).

fields.name: RLEN
fields.description: Width Of The Red Component (In Bits).

fields.name: GPOS
fields.description: Location Of The Green Component Inside The Pixel Memory Word (In Bits).

fields.name: GLEN
fields.description: Width Of The Green Component (In Bits).

fields.name: BPOS
fields.description: Location Of The Blue Component Inside The Pixel Memory Word (In Bits).

fields.name: BLEN
fields.description: Width Of The Blue Component (In Bits).

fields.name: VSH
fields.description: Vertical Synchronization Height (In Units Of Horizontal Scan Line).

fields.name: HSW
fields.description: Horizontal Synchronization Width (In Units Of Pixel Clock Period).

fields.name: AVBP
fields.description: Accumulated Vertical Back Porch (In Units Of Horizontal Scan Line).

fields.name: AHBP
fields.description: Accumulated Horizontal Back Porch (In Units Of Pixel Clock Period).

fields.name: AAH
fields.description: Accumulated Active Height (In Units Of Horizontal Scan Line).

fields.name: AAW
fields.description: Accumulated Active Width (In Units Of Pixel Clock Period).

fields.name: TOTALH
fields.description: Total Height (In Units Of Horizontal Scan Line).

fields.name: TOTALW
fields.description: Total Width (In Units Of Pixel Clock Period).

fields.name: BCP
fields.description: Background Color Programmability (Unique Color Blended As Background).

fields.name: BLA
fields.description: Background Layer Ability (Pixels Of Background Layer Are Read From Memory).

fields.name: BW
fields.description: Bus Width (Log2 Of Number Of Bytes).

fields.name: ADDR
fields.description: Address Of The R,G,B Table Where The Comp Component Is Written.

fields.name: COMP
fields.description: Color Component To Be Written, In Either (Or All) The R,G,B Tables.

fields.name: BLUEEN
fields.description: Write Trigger To The Blue Table.

fields.name: GREENEN
fields.description: Write Trigger To The Green Table.

fields.name: REDEN
fields.description: Write Trigger To The Red Table.

fields.description: Clears The Transfer Error Interrupt Flag.

fields.description: Clears The Fifo Underrun Interrupt Flag.

fields.description: Clears The Crc Error Interrupt Flag.

fields.description: Clears The Fifo Underrun Warning Interrupt Flag.

fields.description: Clears The Transfer Error Interrupt Flag.

fields.name: CFUIF
fields.description: Clears The Fifo Underrun Interrupt Flag.

fields.name: CCRCIF
fields.description: Clears The Crc Error Interrupt Flag.

fields.name: THRE
fields.description: Threshold To Trigger A Fifo Underrun Interrupt (Per Fifo Word, 64 Bits).

variants.name: Maximum
variants.description: maximum burst length (16 words 64 bits, thus 128 Bytes).

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Crcif Flag In Isrx.

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Fuif Flag In Isrx

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Fuwif Flag In Isrx.

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Lif Flag In Isrx.

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Rrif Flag In Isrx.

variants.name: Clear
variants.description: Clears The Terrif Flag In Isrx.

variants.name: ActiveLow
variants.description: Blanking (No Data/Pixel) Polarity Is Active Low.

variants.name: ActiveHigh
variants.description: Blanking (No Data/Pixel) Polarity Is Active High.

variants.name: Active
variants.description: global reload active for this layer (control from LTDC_SRCR enabled).

variants.name: Masked
variants.description: global reload masked for this layer (control from LTDC_SRCR disabled).

variants.name: ActiveLow
variants.description: Horizontal Synchronization Polarity Is Active Low.

variants.name: ActiveHigh
variants.description: Horizontal Synchronization Polarity Is Active High.

variants.name: Reload
variants.description: The Shadow Registers Are Reloaded Immediately.

variants.name: CbFirst
variants.description: Cb Is Output First (Y0Cb, Then Y1Cr, Y2Cb And So On).

variants.name: CrFirst
variants.description: Cr Is Output First (Y0Cr, Then Y1Cb, Y2Cr And So On).

variants.name: Bt601
variants.description: Use Itu-R Bt.601 Set (For Typically Sdtv Analog-Like Displays).

variants.name: Bt709
variants.description: Use Itu-R Bt.709 Set (For Typically Hdtv Digital-Like Displays).

variants.name: RisingEdge
variants.description: The Pixel And Sync Data Are Generated At The Rising-Edge Of The Output Lcd_Clk Clock.

variants.name: FallingEdge
variants.description: The Pixel And Sync Data Are Generated At The Falling-Edge Of The Output Lcd_Clk Clock.

variants.name: Reload
variants.description: The Shadow Registers Are Reloaded During The Vertical Blanking Period (At The Beginning Of The First Line After The Active Display Area).

variants.name: Interleaved
variants.description: interleaved 422 (Cb and Cr component are replicated horizontally for pixels P and P+1).

variants.name: SemiPlanar
variants.description: semi-Planar 420: (Cb and Cr component are replicated horizontally and vertically.The layer main configuration defines the access to the Y buffer, and auxiliary registers define the access to the Cb and Cr buffers).

variants.name: FullPlanar
variants.description: full-Planar 420: (Cb and Cr component are replicated horizontally and vertically. The layer main configuration defines the access to the Y buffer, and auxiliary registers define the access to the Cb and Cr buffers).
